python--applied-python-projects--draft.title: Applied Python Projects: Object-Oriented Apps
python--applied-python-projects--draft.description: A cumulative, project-first Python course where learners build object-oriented apps across multiple files and finish with a complete OOP capstone.
python--applied-python-projects--draft.moreComingSoon: More Applied Python Projects: Object-Oriented Apps lessons are coming soon.

python-8-object-oriented-foundations.title: Object-Oriented Foundations
python-8-object-oriented-foundations.description: Build class files, constructors, methods, and encapsulated object state across a small multifile app.
outcomes: Define classes in dedicated model files and import them into main.py.
Use constructors, attributes, and methods to keep object behavior with object state.
Apply encapsulation with validation and helper/service files.
why: Prepares learners for the next skills in the course.

python-9-inheritance-polymorphism-and-ab.title: Inheritance, Polymorphism, and Abstraction
python-9-inheritance-polymorphism-and-ab.description: Extend the object model with shared base classes, overrides, mixed collections, and simple interface thinking.
outcomes: Use inheritance to share behavior across related classes.
Override methods when subclasses need specialized behavior.
Use polymorphism and simple abstraction so services can work with mixed object types.
why: Builds confidence with inheritance, polymorphism, and abstraction.
Prepares learners for the next skills in the course.

python-10-testing-debugging-oop-projects.title: Testing and Debugging OOP Projects
python-10-testing-debugging-oop-projects.description: Test object state, subclass behavior, polymorphic services, imports, fixtures, and refactors in multifile apps.
outcomes: Write tests for object state changes, validation rules, and subclass overrides.
Debug import errors and object-state bugs in multifile workspaces.
Refactor main.py into model/service/test files while preserving behavior.
why: Builds confidence with testing and debugging oop projects.
Prepares learners for the next skills in the course.

python-11-oop-capstone-project.title: Final OOP Capstone Project
python-11-oop-capstone-project.description: Transfer the course architecture to a Neighborhood Pantry Request Coordinator with models, services, CSV storage, reports, tests, and documentation.
outcomes: Design a clear file architecture for a multifile OOP app.
Use all four OOP pillars in one working project.
Add storage, reporting, tests, and documentation to finish a polished capstone.
why: Builds confidence with final oop capstone project.
Prepares learners for the next skills in the course.

python--applied-python-projects--draft-p.title: Object and Class Foundations
python--applied-python-projects--draft-p.description: Start with object intuition, then class shells, constructors, attributes, and object state.

python--applied-python-projects--draft-p.title: Methods and Validation
python--applied-python-projects--draft-p.description: Add object methods, validate unsafe operations, and let each object protect its own state.

python--applied-python-projects--draft-p.title: Module Project
python--applied-python-projects--draft-p.description: Build an independent account tracker one cumulative step at a time.

python--applied-python-projects--draft-p.title: Inheritance and Overrides
python--applied-python-projects--draft-p.description: Use parent classes for shared behavior and subclasses for specialization.

python--applied-python-projects--draft-p.title: Polymorphism and Abstraction
python--applied-python-projects--draft-p.description: Use common method names and base-class contracts to keep services flexible.

python--applied-python-projects--draft-p.title: Module Project
python--applied-python-projects--draft-p.description: Build a greenhouse sensor monitor one cumulative step at a time.

python--applied-python-projects--draft-p.title: Testing OOP Behavior
python--applied-python-projects--draft-p.description: Write tests for methods, state changes, subclass overrides, and polymorphic loops.

python--applied-python-projects--draft-p.title: Debugging and Refactoring
python--applied-python-projects--draft-p.description: Fix import/state problems and move code into services without changing behavior.

python--applied-python-projects--draft-p.title: Module Project
python--applied-python-projects--draft-p.description: Harden an animal-shelter intake app with tests, storage, state checks, and regression coverage.

python--applied-python-projects--draft-p.title: Capstone Architecture
python--applied-python-projects--draft-p.description: Plan the app structure and build the core domain model.

python--applied-python-projects--draft-p.title: Capstone Services and Polish
python--applied-python-projects--draft-p.description: Add storage, reports, tests, polish, and documentation.

python--applied-python-projects--draft-p.title: Final Capstone
python--applied-python-projects--draft-p.description: Complete the Neighborhood Pantry Request Coordinator through cumulative graded steps.
